subcommands.name: checkout
subcommands.description: Switch branches or restore working tree files

options.description: Create and checkout a new branch

subcommands.name: commit
subcommands.description: Record changes to the repository

options.description: Use the given message as the commit message
Automatically stage modified and deleted files
Use selected commit message without editing

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.description: Update remote refs along with associated objects

options.description: Force update if remote matches expected
Do everything except actually send the updates

subcommands.name: pull
subcommands.description: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or branch

options.description: Rebase the current branch on top of the upstream branch
Merge the upstream branch into the current branch
Create a merge commit even for fast-forward

subcommands.name: merge
subcommands.description: Join two or more development histories together

options.description: Create a merge commit even for fast-forward
Squash commits into a single commit

subcommands.name: rebase
subcommands.description: Reapply commits on top of another base tip

subcommands.name: stash
subcommands.description: Stash the changes in a dirty working directory

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.description: Save your local modifications to a new stash

subcommands.name: pop
subcommands.description: Apply stashed changes and remove from stash

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply stashed changes without removing from stash

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List stashed changes

subcommands.name: drop
subcommands.description: Remove a single stash entry

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show the changes recorded in a stash

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Remove all stash entries

subcommands.name: branch
subcommands.description: List, create, or delete branches

options.description: List both remote-tracking and local branches
Show sha1 and commit subject line

subcommands.name: log
subcommands.description: Show commit logs

options.description: Show each commit on a single line

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Show changes between commits, commit and working tree, etc

options.description: Show only names of changed files
Show names and status of changed files

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show the working tree status

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add file contents to the index

options.description: Add all tracked and untracked files
Only stage modified and deleted files
Don't actually add, just show what would be added

subcommands.name: clone
subcommands.description: Clone a repository into a new directory

options.description: Checkout this branch instead of HEAD
Clone only the history leading to the tip of a single branch

subcommands.name: fetch
subcommands.description: Download objects and refs from another repository

options.description: Remove remote-tracking references that no longer exist

subcommands.name: reset
subcommands.description: Reset current HEAD to the specified state

options.description: Unstage changes but keep in working tree (default)

subcommands.name: cherry-pick
subcommands.description: Apply the changes introduced by some existing commits

options.description: Apply changes without creating a commit

subcommands.name: tag
subcommands.description: Create, list, delete or verify a tag object

subcommands.name: remote
subcommands.description: Manage set of tracked repositories

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a remote

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a remote

subcommands.name: rename
subcommands.description: Rename a remote

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show information about a remote

subcommands.name: set-url
subcommands.description: Change URLs for the remote

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Create an empty Git repository

subcommands.name: switch
subcommands.description: Switch branches

options.description: Create and switch to a new branch
Switch to a commit in detached HEAD state

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.description: Restore working tree files

options.description: Run as if started in the given path
